productDisplayName: Puma Men SL Tech Lo SF White Sports Shoes
description: These SL Tech Lo Scudera ferrari shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by sleek Ferrari styling, are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Perforations around the collar for better breathability Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name on the tongue and cat logo on the forefoot Appliqued formstripe panels on the sides Ferrari badge embedded on the lateral side of the heel Midsole Removable insole that can be replaced with a medical orthotic Phylon midsole for lightweight design Outsole Rubber traction outsole with wrap rubber heel bumper Midfoot bridge provides full pedal control
